raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "During the pandemic, just 17% of California seniors enrolled in PACE were diagnosed with COVID-19 compared to 70% of nursing home residents.",
    "PACE is over 40% less expensive than nursing home care, which will save California $131 million this year.",
    "Expanding PACE access tracks with the preferences of nearly 90% of Californians who want services needed to live at home and in the community as they age.",
    "25 percent of Californians will be aged 60 or over by 2030.",
    "Seniors enrolled in PACE, in California, live with an average of 20 medical conditions, a third of whom have Alzheimer's Disease.",
    "All seniors enrolled in PACE are eligible for Medi-Cal and 75 percent are also covered by Medicare.",
    "PACE is a proven model and a successful alternative to a nursing home.",
    "On Lok pioneered the PACE model of care, which integrates all Medicare and Medicaid services for individuals 55 years of age and older who meet the Medicaid nursing home level of care."
  ]
}
```
